envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your AION SDK API key — get from https://pm-t1.bxingupdate.com/agents

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Only needed for external-wallet self-custody trading. Not required if using AION managed wallets.

envVars.name: POLYGON_RPC_URL
envVars.description: Optional custom Polygon RPC endpoint. Uses default RPC if not set.

envVars.name: MAX_POSITION_SIZE
envVars.description: Maximum position size per market (USDC). Default: 10

envVars.name: MIN_EDGE_THRESHOLD
envVars.description: Minimum edge threshold required to execute trade (0-1). Default: 0.05 (5%)
